entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2016 no longer starting on Windows 11
entry.content: Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: Posting a Job Vacancy for a Specific Sub-Entity
entry.content: Specifically, I am interested in whether this can be achieved by leveraging internal career site filtering (via Career Site Builder), requisition field configuration (e.g., sub-entity assignment), and role-based permissions — ensuring that postings are targeted precisely and not exposed to employees from other entities.

entry.title: Customisation on S4 HANA Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a custom OData Service developed on S4 HANA Server(on-premise), Can we move custom Odata service to S/4 Hana Public cloud system. ? If not then is there is a way to create custom odata service on Public Cloud?

Regards

PM

entry.title: Re: Opening periods in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Melissa,

Hope you're fine.

I'm really glad you're here to share your doubt with the community! Thanks for joining!

I'll try to explain for you using the documentation provided by SAP to fulfill your requirement.

2598676 - Manage Posting Periods Authorization - SAP for Me

2833921 - Error Allowed Posting Periods raised in app Create Supplier Invoice - SAP for Me

3407772 - How to check periods for different Fiscal year variants - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me

Here you can find important points to understand. This error is raised when your posting period/fiscal year doesn't allow you to post in determined month/year. The system suggest you the available period to post your invoice as you can see in the error.

If it's not clear for you, I suggest to open a case in the component MM-IV-LIV-2CL, they will guide you with more incisive information. 

Hope you understand. 

Best Regards,
Erick Goulardt
SAP Support

entry.title: Synchronization between Plant Maintenance and Accounting Assets (Manual)
entry.content:
Hi, dear consultants.

I have a situation I hope you can help me with, as it's urgent.

There is an active automatic synchronization between the AA and PM modules, and the Fixed Assets department purchased some Gator vehicles (small vehicles). Since they don't have official registrations, they purchased them as operating equipment. This led to the creation of equipment type M in the maintenance module. However, these equipment will now be managed through Fleet Management, so we need them to be V vehicles.

The initial approach is to desynchronize the M equipment, create the V equipment as a vehicle, and then synchronize it with the corresponding accounting asset.

However, when I perform the synchronization process, that is, I place the fixed asset, the SAPMIEQ0 program function CHA is not activated. that activates the pencil button for modification (where the 2 is entered to synchronize the asset to the equipment), and even leaves the fixed asset field as editable.

I have run several tests with several pieces of equipment, and one piece of equipment has been successfully synchronized. However, when I try to replicate it, it does the same thing again: it doesn't synchronize the asset, just links it.

Does anyone have any idea why the system does this and how to synchronize it with the new V equipment?

Best regarder
Aguirre

entry.title: Re: Different Profit Center derivation than the Cost Cent...
entry.content:
Dear Jose Ayllon,

Hope you're fine. Thanks for sharing your requirement with us. It will be a pleasure to help you.

Searching in our repository, I'm able to find the document which will help to understand why the system is taking that behavior described. 

Please, take time to read and understand.

3533273 - Profit center cannot be changed while posting journal entries, information message KI339 occurs - SAP for Me

It's the same error, you can follow the solution provided.

If it's isn't clear for you, I suggest to open a case under the same component which the Knowledge Base Article has been created (EC-PCA-ACT-2CL). 

Hope you understand.

Best Regards,
Erick Goulardt
SAP Support

entry.title: Enable Multi-Input Field on the Object Page using RAP
entry.content:
How to enable Multi-Input Field on the Object Page using RAP?

Lets take a example of Procurement Project Business Object. In the BO there is a field "Company Code" for which multi-input needs to enabled in object page. 

Below are the steps to enable above functionality using RAP:

1. Create a custom table with fields "company code" (here companycode is the field of root entity project ) and "procurementprojectuuid" ( here project uuid is the key field of root entity  project)

@EndUserText.label : 'Procurement Project Company Code'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table zprocproj_cc {
  key client             : abap.clnt not null;
  key companycode        : bukrs not null;
  procurementprojectuuid : vdm_procurementprojectuuid;

}

2. Create a Interface view for custom table create at step 1.

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Company COde'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
define view entity ZI_Company_Code_XX
  as select from zprocproj_cc
  association to parent ZI_PROC_PROJ_XX as _procproj on $projection.procurementprojectuuid = _procproj.Procurementprojectuuid
{
  key companycode,
      procurementprojectuuid,
      _procproj



}

Here "ZI_Company_Code_XX" is the Interface View for CompanyCode custom table and "ZI_PROC_PROJ_XX" is the Root Interface View for Procurement Project BO.

You can also find association to parent relationship from companycode Interface view to root view procurement project.

3. Create 1:N composition relation from root entity to company code interface view which is created in step 2

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Procument Project Interface View'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
define root view entity ZI_PROC_PROJ_XX
  as select from mmprocmtproj
  composition [0..*] of zi_proc_plant_xx as _plant
  composition [0..*] of ZI_Company_Code_XX as _CompanyCode
{
  key procurementprojectuuid       as Procurementprojectuuid,
      procurementproject           as Procurementproject,
      procurementprojectname       as Procurementprojectname,
      externalprojectreference     as Externalprojectreference,
      companycode                  as Companycode,
      @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
      createdbyuser                as Createdbyuser,
      @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
      lastchangedbyuser            as Lastchangedbyuser,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
      creationdatetime             as Creationdatetime,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
      lastchangedatetime           as Lastchangedatetime,
      procurementprojectactvtnsts  as Procurementprojectactvtnsts,
      procmtplanningsubprojectuuid as Procmtplanningsubprojectuuid,
      sourcingorigin               as Sourcingorigin,
      sourcingscenario             as Sourcingscenario,
      iseopblocked                 as Iseopblocked,

      _plant,
      _CompanyCode

}

Here root entity is ZI_PROC_PROJ_XX and it has 1:N composition relationship to child entity ZI_Company_Code_XX.

Make sure you activate ZI_PROC_PROJ_XX and ZI_Company_Code_XX together when you form the business object relationship.

4. Enhance  ZI_Company_Code_XX behavior in base BO ZI_PROC_PROJ_XX

managed implementation in class zbp_i_proc_proj_xx unique;
strict ( 2 );
with draft;

define behavior for ZI_PROC_PROJ_XX alias Project
persistent table mmprocmtproj
draft table zprocproj_dxx
lock master
total etag Lastchangedatetime
authorization master ( instance, global )
etag master Lastchangedatetime
with additional save
early numbering
{

  create;
  update;
  delete ( features : global );

  draft action Edit;
  draft action Discard;
  draft action Resume;
  draft action Activate;
  draft determine action Prepare
  {

    validation validate_companycode;
  }



  //field ( numbering : managed ) Procurementprojectuuid;


  //  field ( mandatory ) Companycode;
  field ( readonly : update ) Externalprojectreference;
  field ( readonly ) Sourcingscenario;
  //field ( mandatory : create, readonly : update ) Procurementproject;  //V4

  field ( features : instance ) Procurementproject;

  association _plant { create; with draft; }
  association _CompanyCode { create; with draft; }

  action ( features : instance ) setactive parameter zabstract_project_xx result [1] $self;


  validation validate_companycode on save { field Companycode; }

  determination set_status on modify { create; }

  determination set_project_key on save { create; }

  mapping for mmprocmtproj corresponding
  {
    Lastchangedatetime = lastchangedatetime;
  }
}

define behavior for zi_proc_plant_xx alias Plant
//persistent table mmpprojplant
draft table zprocplantd_xx
lock dependent by _project
authorization dependent by _project
//etag master <field_name>
with unmanaged save
{
  update;
  delete;

  field ( numbering : managed ) procmtprojectplantuuid;
  field ( readonly ) Procurementprojectuuid;
  association _project { with draft; }
}

define behavior for ZI_Company_Code_XX alias CompanyCode
persistent table zprocproj_cc
draft table zprocproj_ccd
lock dependent by _procproj
authorization dependent by _procproj
{
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly ) Procurementprojectuuid;

  association _procproj { with draft; }
}

 What additions are added in the above behavior:

1. define behavior for ZI_Company_Code_XX

2. association _CompanyCode { create; with draft; } in root behavior ZI_PROC_PROJ_XX

3. draft table zprocproj_ccd created using quick fix.

 

5. Create a projection view ZC_PROC_CC_XX for interface view ZI_Company_Code_XX  created in step 2

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Procement Project CC Projection View'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define view entity ZC_PROC_CC_XX as projection on ZI_Company_Code_XX
{
    key companycode,
    procurementprojectuuid,
    /* Associations */
    _procproj : redirected to parent ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX
    
}

Here "_procproj : redirected to parent ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX" relation is formed to root projection entity ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX

6. Create a relation from root project projection view ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX to  company code project view zc_proc_cc_xx.

_CompanyCode : redirected to composition child zc_proc_cc_xx,

Make sure you activate ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX and zc_proc_cc_xx together when you form the business object relationship.


7.  Enhance projection Company code behavior ZC_PROC_CC_XX in projection

projection;
strict ( 2 );
use draft;
define behavior for ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX //alias <alias_name>
implementation in class zcl_proc_proj_c_xx unique
use etag
{
  use create ( augment, precheck );
  use update;
  use delete;


  use action Edit;
  use action Resume;
  use action Activate;
  use action Prepare;
  use action Discard;

  use action setactive;

  use association _plant { create; with draft; }
  use association _CompanyCode { create; with draft; }
}

define behavior for ZC_PROC_PLANT_XX //alias <alias_name>
{
  use update;
  use delete;

  use association _project { with draft; }
}

define behavior for ZC_PROC_CC_XX
{
  use update;
  use delete;
  use association _procproj { with draft; }

}

What additions are added in the above behavior:

1. define behavior for ZC_PROC_CC_XX

2. use association _CompanyCode { create; with draft; } in root behavior ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX

 

8. Expose company code projection view ZC_PROC_CC_XX service definition.

@EndUserText.label: 'Service Binding for Procurement Project'
define service ZSD_PROC_PROJ_XX {
  expose ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX as ProcurementProject;
  expose ZC_PROC_PLANT_XX as ProcurementPlant;
  expose ZC_PROC_CC_XX as ProcurementCC;
}

Here  "expose ZC_PROC_CC_XX as ProcurementCC;" added.

9. Enhance the metadata extension of root view ZC_PROC_PROJ_XX 

  : { lineItem:       [ { position: 70, importance: #HIGH, value: '_CompanyCode.companycode' }
                 ] }
  .identification: [{ position: 70, importance: #HIGH, value: '_CompanyCode.companycode' }]
  _CompanyCode;

Here association _CompanyCode; is exposed in metadata extension and value property '_CompanyCode.companycode'  is added to @ui.linetem and @ui.identification annotation.

10. Now preview the UI.

Now multi-input is enabled for company code field in Object page.

On save in display mode it appears like below:

In list page field it displays like below:

entry.title: Re: Customisation on S4 HANA Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Hi @Pmayank,

I would recommend analyzing the following options:

  • Custom CDS Views: You can use them to define an OData service that can be consumed externally.
  • Create a custom API through Developer Extensibility: Creating Custom APIs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Intent Based Navigation
entry.content: Anyone? ... Surely there must be a way to dynamically change intent-based navigation

entry.title: Re: Secure 2.0 Section 603 Multiple Savings Plans
entry.content: I do appreciate all of your assistance with the problem we are facing. I have not been able to find the suggested BADI 'BADI_FBN_CONTRIBUTION_LIMIT' or 'FBN_CONTRIBUTION_LIMIT' . Is this the correct name of the badi we need to implement? I would really appreciate any logic that you could share with me. Thanks again!

entry.title: Re: Library view - price and item description
entry.content: @AnnaFa, "format.CatalogSearchResults.ApproximatePrice" is the label ID. Searching for it in an environment under the 2505 version, this label was found.

entry.title: Re: SF Learning Delegation Email Link on ILX
entry.content: @syarif, delegate permissions can be adjusted to restrict access to "Approvals" only. As a result, when the delegate uses the "Act as" function, they'll be directed to the home page but will only have visibility of the "Requests for Me" section and the "Approvals" option within the "Activities" menu.

entry.title: Deploying the example cloud foundry project in the BTP learning course fails
entry.content:
When trying to cf push this project in the learning journey into the trial BTP  (git clone https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-foundry-runtime-learning-journey)
After logging in and succesfully building It fails with the following error in the log:
Error: Authentication kind "jwt" configured, but no XSUAA instance bound to application. Either bind an XSUAA instance, or switch to an authentication kind that does not require a binding.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite – Connect Everything FEATURING Snowflake
entry.content:
Welcome to the fourth installment of our "SAP Integration Suite – Connect Everything" blog series. In this edition, we'll be exploring the transformative potential of integrating Snowflake, a leading cloud data warehouse solution, with SAP Cloud Integration, a powerful integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) within the SAP Integration Suite through its native Snowflake adapter.

Pre-Requisites 📝

This blog focuses on the integration with Snowflake through the native Snowflake Adapter of SAP Cloud Integration to be used as a receiver. The availability of the adapter is dependent on the SAP Integration Suite service plan. For more information about different service plans and their supported feature set, see SAP Notes 2903776 and 3188446 . To read more on this adapter refer the help documentation. 

For other service plans the connectivity can be established through the traditional Open Connectors Snowflake Rest API .

Snowflake trial account has been used for the Demo.

🚨 Caution 🚨

Please be advised that for mass data exchange (with or without External staging), this operation can affect significantly the performance of SAP Cloud Integration tenant. Hence please inspect and analyse the existing tenant health before productive usage of mass data exchange. Data compression technique (GZIP) has been found considerably performance booster in this scenario. 

Introduction

As businesses strive to harness the power of data-driven decision-making, the ability to seamlessly connect cloud-based data warehouses and enterprise applications has become a strategic imperative. By diving deep into the technical details and best practices, we will uncover the remarkable benefits that the Snowflake integration can bring to your enterprise ecosystem.

What is Snowflake...?

Snowflake is a modern cloud native data warehouse solution that has gained significant attention in the enterprise data management landscape. Its architecture is designed to provide scalability, flexibility, and performance for organisations managing large and diverse data sets.

What is SAP Cloud Integration...?

As a key component of the SAP Integration Suite, SAP Cloud Integration plays a vital role in connecting various SAP and non-SAP systems within the Enterprise ecosystem. As a powerful iPaaS solution, SAP Cloud Integration offers a comprehensive set of integration capabilities, including data integration, process integration, and API management.

What is the advantage...?

By leveraging SAP Cloud Integration and its prepackaged Out-of-the-box benefits, organizations can seamlessly connect Snowflake with their existing SAP applications, such as SAP IBP(Integrated Business Planning), SAP ERP, SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP S/4HANA or Non-SAP applications. This integration allows for the efficient exchange of data, the automation of business processes and the creation of data-driven insights that can drive strategic decision-making.

I would like to re-iterate the native Snowflake adapter highlights as described in the official documentation (please refer this documentation to check for the most recent features)

  • Bulk Export and Import: Supports reading files from multiple input formats like CSV, JSON, and Avro. Export data to your desired format using unload operation.
  • Snowflake Operations Support: Snowflake Adapter offers support for all Snowflake operations along with extended SQL support for advanced users.
  • Ease of Access and Connectivity : Snowflake adapter allows you to save connection related details on our platform which simplifies operations and querying on your part.
  • Multiple options for Staging Storage: Snowflake Adapter provides various options to load data into staging storage like Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage, or Microsoft Azure configured in Snowflake.
  • Secure Authentication: Provides secure authentication with Database Account and Key-Pair options.

What's the High Level Architecture...?

With the release of the native Snowflake adapter SAP Cloud Integration has unlocked the out of the box capability to integrate with Snowflake databases either with or without external staging for mass data exchange.

What are the Steps to Configure...?

Let's explore the step-by-step configurations required to establish a successful connection between the two platforms.

Step 1

Fetch the required Snowflake details based on the chosen Authentication Type.

Step 2

Copy Prepackaged Adapter from the Discover section

Step 3

 Deploy the copied adapter from Design section

Step 4

Once deployed the adapter is available to be used to integrate Snowflake as receiver

Configure the connection details

  • Database Account Type authentication

     

  • Key-Pair Authentication (Refer the section 3.3.2 Creating Keystore for Key-Pair Authentication in the descriptive documentation link shared below)

    Please refer the descriptive documentation for steps to generate Keystore(JKS file) 

Alternative Approach to create Keystore (RSA Key) Private key alias in SAP Cloud Integration through PEM file followed in this demo
  • Run the commands in the below sequence in SnowSQL/OpenSSL to create encrypted private key(.p8) and public key(.pub). You will be asked to create a pass phrase for the private key and will be needed in the later steps while using this private key.
    openssl genrsa 2048 | openssl pkcs8 -topk8 -v2 des3 -inform PEM -out rsa_key.p8
    openssl rsa -in rsa_key.p8 -pubout -out rsa_key.pub
  • Assign this public key to the user through SQL query run in Snowflake
    ALTER USER SnowflakeDemo SET RSA_PUBLIC_KEY='MIIXXX';
  • For the next steps I would like to give a disclaimer that I am not an expert in openssl and its a quick trial browsing online to generate pem key (with RSA private key header) from encrypted p8 key. Please feel free to comment if it can be simplified.
    Run below steps to create pem key
    openssl pkcs8 -in rsa_key.p8 -outform DER -inform PEM -out snowflake.der
    openssl rsa -inform DER -in snowflake.der -outform PEM -out snowflake_rsa.pem


  • Use the generated snowflake_rsa.pem file in creating a RSA Key Keystore Alias in SAP Cloud Integration.
     
Step 5

Configure the Processing details in the adapter configuration for various operations supported. The configuration details for these operations are well explained in the official documentation.

Below is the distinction of the bulk operations that can only be used with External staging. You can refer the external staging steps documented for Amazon S3 as a part of SAP TechEd 2024 - IN280 session (SAP IBP - Snowflake integration). Watch out the IN280 session video here

With External Staging
  • Bulk Upsert
  • Unload

    The sequence of calls from SAP Integration Suite(SAP Cloud Integration)
Without External Staging
  • Delete
  • Execute
  • Insert
  • Select
  • Table List
  • Update
Step 6

Deploy and run the IFlow through self-timer or external trigger to cherish the mere lookup or mass data exchange efficiency from Snowflake.

What are your experiences with Snowflake integration in SAP? Would love to know your thoughts, adventures and use cases in the comments! 🤠

Stay tuned for the next installment of our "SAP Integration Suite – Connect Everything" series, where we will explore even more exciting integration scenarios and capabilities within the SAP Integration Suite.

entry.title: Internal Customer Material Codes with Supplier Product Code
entry.content: Is there a way for a customer to link our configured product ID/SKU that is transferred from their punch-out eCat with their internal material code and add that code to their PO/purchase requisition?

entry.title: Re: Completed Learning Activities status showing as Planned
entry.content: @ramyamula, trying to collaborate with @mbshatto, it'd be possible to review the completion date (Edit Learning History) to determine if it aligns with the conclusion of the development goal.

entry.title: Re: Unable to send the observation content via email
entry.content: @Bernardita, just to confirm, are you trying to send the notification via the Learning Administration side > Task course > "Actions" menu > "Send Email Notification" option? If so, does an error happen when the "ObserverNotification" email template is selected? What do you mean by "I am not able to send..."?

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM - Integration Monitoring - cant filter out m...
entry.content:
Hi, Christopher_J,

I see the developer in this area just created a blog in the area of filtering: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/filtering-on-custom-parameters-in-sap-cloud-alm-integration-monitoring/ba-p/14088250

Perhaps you will find your answer here or pose the question to him as the expert there?

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: Change data in the dropdown list or searchHelp with draft in RAP in Odata v4gets the old text a
entry.content: @ShivamChadha The Same app with ODATA V2 : this problem does not appear it appears when i run it with ODATA V4 only .

entry.title: Provisioning between MRP storage areas
entry.content:
Hello friends, a question: In the project I'm involved in, all materials are configured to be planned at the MRP storage area level. Therefore, the client asked me to transfer supplies between MRP storage areas in different plants. Example:

I have plant A with an MRP storage area A that I want transferred to MRP storage area B in plant B and vice versa.

That is, the supply should not be from plant to storage area, but rather from MRP storage area in plant A to MRP storage area B in plant B.

This is possible with the help of BADI.

entry.title: Re: Change data in the dropdown list or searchHelp with draft in RAP in Odata v4gets the old text a
entry.content: @ShivamChadha I am using additional save with managed scenario . in additional save i am inserting some data in infotypes . If you want any further info please tell me .

entry.title: Re: Creating a unique QR code for anyone to be able to vi...
entry.content: @kyleholdgate, as I understand the situation and available features, that isn’t currently possible. The QR Code is available to assist with attendance recording (Enabling QR Codes to Record Attendance). Enhancement requests have been created to improve the QR Code usage (sample1, sample2). Alternatively, a direct link route can be pursued.

entry.title: Build Process Automation - mail attachment size
entry.content:
Is there a way to get information about mail attachment size? Currently my workaround is to save attachments and then use file system activities to retrieve the size. Is there any direct way to get this information from outlook without the need of saving the files (and deleting them later if needed)? Probably using some custom script?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Signavio certification
entry.content:
I am in process to prepare for "SAP Certified Associate - Process Data Analyst - SAP Signavio".  I have access to Process collaboration Hub  only. I can navigate to Process Manager but no option for Intelligence

In chapter 4 "Starting an Investigation (Analysis)"

The next step is to  create a NEW PROCESS  and import PI_Training_Attr_v3_EN.csv and PI_Training_Eventlog_v3_EN.csv

I can not figure out how to create a new process from Process collaboration hub and how to navigate to Process intelligence.

entry.title: Re: Initialization of store - WP_PLU (not using WBBDLD)
entry.content: How can i control if WP_PLU01, 02 OR 03 will be generated ?

entry.title: Re: Maintain BusinessPartner Master Data using OData APIs in a SAP S/4HANA Cloud system
entry.content: Can you please list the equivalent OData service in S/4 HANA on-premise?

entry.title: Re: Representation of multiple contracts of employees alo...
entry.content:
Hi @akoutsompinas 

So after a review with my colleagues they all agree that the answer to this is with the Concurrent Employment feature of EC. 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Deactivate EWM for SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP team,

Our client is thinking of deactivating EWM for their SAP Public cloud system but we are not able to find any guidelines regarding this. Would you be able to help with the action items if we proceed with this deactivation? Will it be easily done through configuration or do we need SAP help? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Deactivate EWM for SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Denlee,

Once the scope items for Cloud WM are activated, they can't be deactivated.

Depending upon how far you have gone with the configuration & setup of Cloud WM, the option would be to stick with non-warehouse managed storage locations. With non-warehouse managed storage locations you can still follow the standard LE logistics processes. Only for the warehouse managed storage locations the documents get distributed to the Cloud WM.

Hope this helps.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: WP_PLU03 Idoc - Retail Pricing
entry.content: i can't Obtain the WP_PLU IDOC

entry.title: Electronic bank statement processing failed
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm trying to import a bank statement using a template in SAP FIORI, but when I upload the file, it shows the message: "Could not import file: BANK_STATEMENT.xlsx"
Reason: System error accessing Knowledge Provider. The odd thing is that the quality setting does allow me, and I've checked the role settings, and they're the same.

Is this due to some additional configuration?

Thank you

#Finanzas

entry.title: Re: Lease Accounting - alternatives to Open Item Manageme...
entry.content: Thanks but we're aware of this note and it's just restating what I already described in my original post (that we're unable to use OIM for the lease clearing account). What we are looking for is a way to make reconciling this account easier.

entry.title: Re: Possible options for API Monitoring via SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content: We are currently encountering a similar situation. May I ask which option you selected? Additionally, would the use of cloud logging be applicable in this scenario?

entry.title: “quota exceeded" error in SAP Build basic trial environment
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am currently preparing for the C_LCNC_2406 (SAP Certified Associate - Low-Code/No-Code Developer - SAP Build) certification, which requires completion of the "Experiencing End-to-End SAP Build" system exercise ( https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/experiencing-end-to-end-sap-build ).
As part of this exercise, I am instructed to create a new process in SAP Build Process Automation using the provided SAP Build basic trial environment. Unfortunately, when attempting to create a new Process there, I encounter the following error:

Error

Permitted quota of 750 was exceeded (type: "project").

Correlation Id: e6afe57f-1cc0-47b7-64c8-762ce904183e

Has anyone experienced this issue before and knows how I can approach or resolve it?

I’ve already created a case in the SAP Learning help center, but the SAP Learning Support Team informed me that this issue lies outside their support scope as the trial environment is publicly hosted.

I truly appreciate any help or suggestions you can provide.

Best regards,
Anna

entry.title: Re: Rebate to Payer capped on a Ship-to Customer
entry.content:
Hi @priya_sshekhar, 

This requirement might be addressed using standard SAP CCM capabilities, with a few adjustments.
As @MichaelWerner rightly pointed out, the key is to use Ship-To as a split criterion so that it is available at the settlement document line item level.

The following steps might work for your scenario (non exhaustive list): 

  • Create a copy of RES1 and maintained it as Calculation type "B" for Fixed amount
  • Create an access sequence Condition Contract/Ship-to - This will allow you to maintain different fixed amount caps per Ship-To.
  • Add the custom condition to the Condition type group used for your contract type
  • Add the custom condition to your condition exclusion group and with the correct Condition exclusion Procedure
  • Use Transfer Manager to transfer Ship-to in settlement line item to Pricing communication structure header (Ship-to)

After that, you'll need to maintain your rebate condition and the Cap (fixed amount) condition at ship-to level. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere integration with SQL server using Data Provisioning Agent
entry.content: In another scenario, we have stored procedures created in MS SQL Server. I would like to know if it is possible to extract the output of these stored procedures into Datasphere. If yes, could you please advise on the method to achieve this?

entry.title: Ms SQL Server to Datasphere
entry.content: we have stored procedures created in MS SQL Server. I would like to know if it is possible to extract the output of these stored procedures into Datasphere. If yes, could you please advise on the method to achieve this?

entry.title: 1H 2025 - SFSL-14795 - Redesigned Continuous Performance Management Role-Based Permissions
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I gone through the release notes on this release item and it does not give any notes on how to use the permissions and how it differs. 

Appreciate if any expert or the Product team guide us on how to test or use this, it really helps us.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How can I link to a Success Factors function that app...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for your quick reply. 

1. Regarding the query - Which SF functions should be accessible via deep links and which shouldn't?

I would recommend creating a post here: SAP Community >> SAP SuccessFactors Platform. The deep link topic is owned by the Platform team, and they may be able to provide more professional advice and support.

2. Additionally, I noticed that most of your other queries are related to SuccessFactors Work Zone. I am from the Employee Central team and have limited knowledge of Work Zone, so I regret to inform you that I may not be able to offer much support in that area. Thank you for understanding.

 

Best regards,

Hannah

entry.title: NWBC --> Access Management --> Access Request Administration --> Search Request
entry.content:
From which tables the data is fetching to Search Request screen, the status of the search request, in which stage the request is pending and who is the approver for that stage?

Is there any table to know the details of the status of the pending request, which stage the request is pending and who is the approver for that stage, can we find with the help of Access Request Number.

thank you

 ITGC Chandra

entry.title: Re: Granular Application Access Control in SAP Cloud Identity Services: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
Hi Anita,

SAP has provided policy-based access control for Identity Provisioning. Hope this helps for your requirement.

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/configure-provisioning-authorizations

Regards,

Bhagya

entry.title: Re: Report for change history of fixed asset
entry.content: Is there now a report to list changes applied for all fixed assets?

entry.title: Copy the Equipment Class from the Material Master to the Equipment Master
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Whenever Equipment is created with Equipment category “S” and “P”, the  class and characteristics must be copied from the material to the newly created equipment.

On analysis we have found that this can be achieved through Customer Exit "Enhancement - IEQM0003Component - EXIT_SAPMIEQ0_001 " and we were unable to find a suitable BADI. As Customer Exit falls under Tier 3 of clean core approach, wanted to check if there an alternative way to achieve the functionality.

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: SAP Meetup New York City May 2025 - Meet the champion!
entry.content:
Hello SAP New Yorker Enthusiasts,

This is a quick call for a spontaneous meetup!

The amazing @walid  is coming to NYC, and we’d love to gather for a simple and relaxed get-together. Whether you're a developer, an SAP expert, or just tech-curious, this is a great chance to connect with like-minded SAP professionals in a casual setting. 🎉

🗓 Date: May 9th, 2025
🕔 Time: 6:30 PM
📍 Location: Katz (?)

We're considering Katz's Delicatessen for the meetup—it’s a New York classic, and no trip here is complete without trying it! Suggestions for other spots are welcome, especially as we get a sense of how many people will join.

No specific agenda—just SAP lovers sharing stories, laughs, and maybe a pastrami sandwich or two. 😄

entry.title: Re: Get onboard with the latest SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding solution in 6 weeks!
entry.content:
Join our upcoming webinar! Preparing for the Latest Onboarding Solution: Key Steps for a Smooth Transition (AMER/EMEA: May 13th, APJ: May 14th) 

Join our product experts for tor this webinar on key benefits and best practices for transitioning to the latest SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding solution. As we approach the end of maintenance for Onboarding "1.0" in November 2025 and its full depreciation in May 2026, it's crucial to understand how you can prepare effectively. Register today!

AMER/EMEA: Tuesday, May 13th | 10:00-11:00 am EDT | 16:00-17:00 CEST
APAC: Wednesday, May 14th | 9:00-10:00 am SGT | 6:30-7:40 am IST

Extend and Integrate Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition > Integration > Communication Management
While for every scenario, we also have set-up instruction available.

Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: CDS views for Manage Workforce app SAP Public Cloud 2502
entry.content:
Hi @vk36 

If you want to get email address information based on Person External ID(Worker ID) via CDS view, then you need to create a custom CDS view with I_WorkforcePerson and follow the association to get Workplace information.

Or if you are using Business partner i.e. Employee business partner number to fetch email address information, then you can directly use I_BusinessUserBasic which would give both Business User and the workplace related information like email address.

Alternatively you can also check I_WorkplaceAddress but a BP GUID is needed for this CDS view.

For documentation of those CDS views, kindly search in the help page CDS Views.

Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: Automatic Batch Determination Issue in EWM (S/4HANA Cloud 2502)

entry.title: Re: MODIFICATION OF THE VALUATION CLASS IN PRODUCT MASTER DATA
entry.content: Hi Ismael, Thank you for joining the community. I have informed the potential expert in this area for answering your question. Best Regards, Irene

entry.title: Re: Calling an OData V4 custom action from within an iFlow.
entry.content:
I've got calling the custom action to work using the HTTP adapter. This is what I did to get the CSRF working:

1) Do a HTTP GET on anything supported by the service. E.g. /$metadata. Need to pass X-CSRF-Token=Fetch in the request header

2) This prompts the backend system to generate a CSRF token and pass it back in the response header. I used this Groovy script to pull out the CSRF token and the session cookies and store them in properties. 

3) Now pass both the X-CSRF-Token and Cookies to the POST operation. Tip: the cookies are passed back from the original GET in header field Set-Cookies. When passing them in the request header to the POST you need to use header field Cookies.

This is my first iFlow, so it's probably not an ideal solution, but it works. Hope this helps someone.

- Anthony.

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Time dimension issue (Previous year data di...
entry.content: Yes, you even use script to set a default value for the current date input control on story loading, and then user is still able to change it.

Soma

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session | APAC | English
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with #SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

Your Next Steps

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

Is there something wrong with my configuration?

Thank you for all the help.

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Re: History of deleted COGI records
entry.content: Reshare the same please., having same issue.

entry.title: Re: Scheduling replication of exchange rates to C4C with DRF
entry.content: hello Markus, thank you for the sharing. I have the similar requirement now, but it is mentioned in note 2779534 this service is not enabled for scheduling. I'd like to check if this solution works well in your case? thank you very much! https://me.sap.com/notes/2779534/E

entry.title: Customer Hierarchy In Condition Contract / delta accrual
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I am using a customer hierarchy node in a condition table for a condition contract. The accruals are generated via the normal SD F2 invoice and the customer hierarchy works fine. But when doing a delta accrual, the pricing analysis shows that the value for the customer hierarchy isnt found, while using the same condition table as in the SD invoice pricing. Any idea what the cause of this is.

entry.title: Re: Transporting standard table from DEV to PROD
entry.content: Capture content in a trasnport in se16 -> Check in transport of  object type 'TABU'(short text - Table Contents') then move this trasnport to PROD and Import it in PROD &Check in PROD Data will be available.

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 - Automatically on - VRP-14767 - Compensation...
entry.content: Balaji, we are working on resolving this. Will provide an update once the fix is available.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere license just to consume data in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Is a separate Datasphere license required solely for consuming data in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)? If a user has an SAC license and the SAC reports retrieve data from Datasphere, does the user also need a Datasphere license? Note that the SAC user does not need to log in to Datasphere.

Best Regards
Arvind

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM 환영 웨비나 | 대한민국
entry.content:
안녕하세요 고객 여러분,

 

SAP Cloud ALM을 사용하기로 결정하신 것을 기쁘게 생각합니다. SAP Cloud ALM 을 사용하기 위한 처음 단계에 필요한 모든 중요 정보가 들어 있는 “Access information for SAP Cloud ALM” 이메일을 최근에 받으셨을 것입니다.

더불어서 SAP는 처음으로 SAP를 사용하기 시작한 고객에게 실시간으로 직접적인 지원을 제공 하고자 합니다. 따라서 귀하와 모든 신규 SAP Cloud ALM 고객을 위해 21 May 에 아래 내용이 포함된 웹세션을 제공할 예정 입니다.

 

• SAP Cloud ALM에 처음 로그인하는 단계
• 첫 번째 로그인 후 일반적인 다음 단계에 대한 설명
• 고객을 위한 필수 SAP Cloud ALM 학습 자료를 찾는 방법
• 알아두면 도움이 되는 잠재적인 문제에 대한 팁
• 참석 고객의 질문에 대한 답변 및 안내 제공

 

등록 링크

APJ (한국 고객)을 위한  SAP Cloud ALM 신규 고객 웰컴 한국어 세션:  21 May 2:00 PM KST

Register Here

감사합니다.

SAP Cloud ALM  고객 관리 팀

entry.title: SAP CHOTA TALKS HYDERABAD 2025 (Q2) - Hyderabad Coming Soon
entry.content:
Dear All,

In the blooming month of May, when ideas flourish like spring flowers, the eagerly anticipated SAP CHOTA TALKS 2025 Q2 will once again open its doors to the curious and the visionary.

 

This quarterly celebration of technological brilliance serves as both lighthouse and laboratory—illuminating emerging trends while crafting the future blueprint of enterprise innovation.

Mark your calendars. Set your compasses. The stage is being set for a May rendezvous that promises to transform how we envision, implement, and elevate the SAP experience.

 

Hyderabad SAP Community, get ready! SAP CHOTA TALKS 2025 (Q2) is coming your way this May!

The countdown to inspiration has begun.

Help us tailor the SAP CHOTA TALKS HYDERABAD 2025 (Q2)

We want your input:

1.Why Attend? What makes these meetups truly valuable for you personally or professionally?

2.Your Challenges? What specific SAP topics, trends, or problems are you currently grappling with that insights could help solve?

3.Best Format? What kind of session helps you learn best? (e.g., Speaker Sessions? Panel Discussions ? Deep Dives? Ask Anything  Panels? Hands-on Demos? Dedicated Networking time? Customer success stories? More informal discussions? Product Demos?)

Share your thoughts below! 👇 Let's co-create a great Q2 experience.

#SAPChotaTalks #Hyderabad #SAPCommunity #SCTHYD #SCT2025Q2 #SAP #TechEvent #SAPCommunity

@VASAVI Rongali @Ruthvik_Chowdary  @KatherineKenneally @lauraschmitz @                          @PoonamGojeSing @Fathima Shaik @vidya Chandran @Naresh Dasika @Dileep Saketi

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALMをお申し込みいただいたお客様向けウェルカムセッション（日本語開催）
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALMテナントにお申し込みいただいたお客様

 

平素より弊社製品、サービスをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。

 

このメールは、SAP Cloud ALMテナントにお申し込みいただいたお客様へお送りしております。SAP Cloud ALMの初期設定方法と機能概要をご紹介する、日本語リモートセッションです。参加費はかかりませんので、お気軽にご参加ください。

 

セッション名：SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session

日時：4月24日（水）午前10時～11時30分（日本時間）

 

以下の内容を日本語でご説明いたします（資料は英語です）。

 

• SAP Cloud ALMへの初回アクセス方法

• ユーザー追加と初期設定方法

• 機能概要の紹介とデモ

• 役立つ資料・サイトのご案内

• Q&A

 

セッションへのお申し込みは、以下のリンクからお願いいたします。

5月23日 午前10時～11時30分（日本時間）

Register Now

entry.title: how to get participant handbook for codejam re: event based processes
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently following a codejam blog regarding event-based processes for sap build. here is the link of my current lesson: 3 - Explore SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh | SAP Tutorials

one of the prerequisite is a "participants handbook" which contains the system and credentials needed to follow the blog.

where can i get this? thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements : CDS And Overview Page-Part 2
entry.content: @MANYAM_MURALI@Swin  : Will be uploaded in next few days 🙂  Sorry to keep you waiting.

entry.title: Re: Ariba : Report containing PR and PO numbers
entry.content: Instead of using report in SBN, you may look into the report in Ariba B&I, in that space you should be able to find the info you need.

entry.title: Re: SF Learning Delegation Email Link on ILX
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I appreciate the clarification on the steps to act as a delegate. However, my query pertains to the email notification sent to a delegate, which includes a token labelled "Direct Link to Delegation Task." Previously, this link allowed the delegate to access the delegator's approval page directly, without additional steps such as clicking on "act as." I would be grateful for your insights on this matter.

entry.title: Re: AI Agent
entry.content:
Hi Darma,

AI Agents in SAP is integrated through SAP Joule strategy and SAP AI Core/Foundation.

S/4 HANA Public Cloud: AI Agent available via Joule

S/4 HANA Private Cloud:  Via AI Core Foundation (BTP)

SAP BTP: available via AI Core

Enable via,  Entitlements → Add Service: AI Core & AI Foundation (not available in 'trial').

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Upload/copy paste to table level not to model in SAP...
entry.content:
If copy & paste not preferred and upload starter is not feasible( because model year & factory is not part of user data),  my only suggest would be:

  1. Still use upload starter to upload user data to factory =  # and model year = #
  2. Run data action to allocate uploaded data to desired factory/model year combination based on your pre-filled ratio/weight.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere CLI & Python: Exporting Modeling Objects to CSV Files for Each Artifact
entry.content: Nice

entry.title: RSP Execution Failed
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently facing an RSP issue. The system health check is always failing. Does anyone here have any idea?

entry.title: Re: Transporting standard table from DEV to PROD
entry.content:
Hi,

interesting reply, but SAP Note

2449129 - Table Entry -> Transport Entries grey out in SE16 

should be mentioned.

Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" for BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2
entry.content:
Hi,

can you share the SM13 entries for this error,

Try to call the BAPI function with BACKGROUND TASK, if this doesnt work, then try below.

also try to call the BAPI function inside a custom wrapper function with UPDATE TASK, custom function should be start delayed with update.

entry.title: Re: CC users not receiving the correct email
entry.content:
Hi Gelo,
Are the document generation templates used in Approver and CC steps in same document generation group?

Does the subject user's default locale match the language set in document generation template?

Best regards, Ashley

entry.title: Re: Log in as another CB user
entry.content:
Hi Soma,

It's not possible.

Would like to know what's the business requirement behind.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: Default a custom field value into a standard field
entry.content: I think so, you can always describe the logic in CRD request document, and the TL will review and check feasibility.

entry.title: Re: Skills in Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi Sam,

We are moving to TIH however the migration seems to be possible to only Competency Attribute in TIH? 
My concern is we no longer use the term competency anymore and for us it is "Skills" in all the systems. 

When you say renaming in the above comment - can you expand on where can we do this to no have to do a double migration of data from competency attribute to skill attribute

 

Thanks

Vandana
